ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, book, thesis) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "age_band" TEXT /* Age band covered by the publication (e.g., K-12, general) */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics or keywords associated with the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the publication is written */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal (if applicable) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "is_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication is peer-reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the author's personal or professional website */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_publications" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., Education, Anthropology, Sociology) */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_topics" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_bands" (
  "age_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age band */,
  "age_band_name" TEXT /* Name of the age band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age band */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age band */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_age_bands" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "age_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "age_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the repository (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's affiliated institution */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus identifier for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_publications" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the publication (e.g., author, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is approved */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., Education, Cultural Diversity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_tags" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_institutions" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_institutions" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the discussion */,
  "discussion_text" TEXT /* Text of the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was made */,
  "parent_discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent discussion (for threaded discussions) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the discussion is approved */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the discussion is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_parent_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
